title: Check Sync Status
description: Monitor the synchronization status of a cookie update task

content.introduction: This endpoint checks the synchronization status of a cookie update task using its hash ID. Use this to monitor whether your account cookies have been successfully synchronized.

parameters.name: sync_task_id
parameters.description: The synchronization task ID returned from Sync Account or Refresh Cookies

proTips.content: Poll this endpoint every few seconds after initiating a sync until status_code reaches 200 (synchronized) or an error state.
Once status_code is 200, use the returned account_hash to access the synchronized account with Get Account Details.
If synchronization remains at status_code 120 for more than 30 seconds, the cookies may be invalid. Try re-syncing with fresh cookies.

seo.title: Check Sync Status - Lobstr.io API Documentation
seo.description: Learn how to monitor cookie synchronization task status using the Lobstr.io API.
